top_findings: API usage-doc coverage is low: 50.0% (180 API pages detected)

analysis.executive_summary: Documentation audit of docs.baseten.co crawled 283 of 300 requested pages (100.35% coverage) with zero broken links detected across all categories. API reference coverage stands at 50.0% across 180 detected API pages, indicating significant documentation gaps. SEO/GEO issues affect 16.78% of pages, impacting discoverability. Example reliability estimate is 0.0%, suggesting code examples lack verification or testing infrastructure. Overall audit confidence is 91.5%.
strengths: Zero broken links (internal, docs, or repository navigation)
Complete crawl coverage at 100.35% with 283 pages successfully indexed
Clean link hygiene with no unverified or excluded links
risks: 50% API reference coverage leaves half of API surface undocumented across 180 API pages
0.0% example reliability indicates no code example testing or validation in place
16.78% SEO/GEO issue rate may significantly reduce organic search visibility and user acquisition
15 trap URLs were skipped during crawl, potentially hiding content quality issues
API confidence at 85% suggests potential gaps in API detection methodology
Missing API documentation creates support burden and developer friction
Untested examples risk user frustration and eroded trust in documentation quality

prioritized_actions.action: Implement automated code example testing pipeline to validate all examples against live API
Document remaining 50% of API surface by auditing codebase against existing API pages
Remediate SEO/GEO issues on 47 affected pages (meta descriptions, titles, structured data)
Investigate 15 trap URLs to determine if legitimate content is being excluded from crawl
Establish API documentation coverage monitoring to prevent regression below 80% threshold

limitations: External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content or correctness of code examples without execution
API coverage detection relies on pattern matching and may miss non-standard API documentation structures
SEO/GEO scoring does not measure actual search ranking performance or conversion impact
Crawl cannot assess documentation completeness for features not yet publicly documented
Link verification confirms HTTP status only, not semantic correctness of link destinations
